2026-04-03.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, io_buffer_register_bvec(), to the io_uring/rsrc module. The function allows registering an array of bio vectors (bvecs) for use in I/O operations. This is a preparatory step for implementing zero-copy support over FUSE using io_uring. The function takes several parameters, including the bvec array, its length, and flags for issue and release. It also includes error handling and locking to ensure thread safety.
